slides.title: The paradox
slides.body: US blockade intent and ASEAN consequence diverge but converge on strait closure as power instrument.

slides.title: ECONOMIC_BLOCKADE_EFFICACY
slides.body: 1 bucket · US operation framed as successful economic coercion driving Iran toward negotiation. · "How the U.S. blockade is starting to hurt Iran's economy" — CBC World

slides.title: CEASEFIRE_FRAGILITY
slides.body: 1 bucket · Month-old ceasefire repeatedly tested by tactical clashes. · "U.S. says it intercepted Iranian attacks on 3 navy ships in Strait of Hormuz" — CBC World

slides.title: DEAL_NEGOTIATION_WINDOW
slides.body: 1 bucket · 30-day ceasefire creates diplomatic space for peace negotiations. · "Trump recua e diz que operação para reabrir Hormuz será suspensa em tentativa de finalizar acordo" — Folha de São Paulo
